subject: [RFC PATCH 39/45] mm: debug: prevent infinite recursion in dump_page() with CMA

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch prevents infinite recursion in the dump_page() function when dealing with Contiguous Memory Allocation (CMA). It does this by adding a guard to check if the page frame number is valid and if the zone spans that pfn before calling is_migrate_cma_folio(). This change allows dump_page() to safely report on pages without a meaningful zone, preventing infinite recursion due to VM_BUG_ON_PAGE firing. The patch was found during early boot testing where a page in an unavailable range caused stack exhaustion.
